Join The Crypto All-Stars Presale to Earn

Crypto All-Stars is about to change everything you know about owning meme coins.

Introducing the groundbreaking MemeVault – an innovative vault protocol that allows you to earn $STARS tokens by staking popular meme coins.

The $STARS presale is live NOW! Get in early to start earning rewards before the world gains access to the cutting-edge MemeVault platform.

Featured In

Roadmap 

Uniting all the top meme coins under one banner, the MemeVault brings together the entire meme coin community under the Crypto All-Stars umbrella.

All of the greatest meme coins combined into a single force: Crypto All-Stars.

Presale The first step in Crypto All-Stars' plan for global domination is the Presale and Staking phase. Early buyers can secure their $STARS tokens and start earning exceptional returns while our international marketing efforts ramp up, setting the stage for the MemeVault ecosystem launch.

$STARS Token Launch As soon as we launch, holders of the world's top meme coins will be rushing to buy $STARS, eager to maximize their holdings before the MemeVault goes live. The more $STARS you own, the greater your staking potential within the MemeVault!

Unlocking The Vault Crypto All-Stars will make history with the launch of the revolutionary MemeVault network. Whether you're a whale or a small fish, you can stake all the top meme coins – but to maximize your earnings, you MUST own $STARS. That’s the incentive!

Tokenomics

The specific breakdown of how the $STARS token supply is allocated is detailed below:

20%

Presale

A literal race to gobble up as many $STARS tokens as possible before it hits the open market. Be fast!

25%

Presale Staking

A big piece of the pie goes to those who choose to stake their tokens during Presale for huge early rewards!

20%

Marketing

Even before the MemeVault Ecosystem goes live, we've gotta let the people across the world know where the party is!

10%

CEX/DEX

A significant portion of the total supply is earmarked for CEX and DEX liquidity pools.

25%

MemeVault Ecosystem

A large number of Crypto All-Stars tokens are dedicated to powering the MemeVault Ecosystem, as well as developing the capabilities of the MemeVault itself.

Presale

20%

Staking

25%

Marketing

20%

CEX/DEX

10%

MemeVault Ecosystem

25%

How To Buy 

Purchasing Crypto All-Stars is simple, even for first-time meme coin explorers!

Purchasing Crypto All-Stars is simple, even for first-time meme coin explorers!

Create Your Wallet For PC users, install the MetaMask wallet browser extension to store your $STARS. Prefer mobile? Download Best Wallet for an easy setup. Already have a wallet? Click the Wallet Connect button to check compatibility.

Get Some Crypto Skip this step if you're paying with a card. Otherwise, purchase crypto on a centralized exchange like Coinbase, Binance, Kraken, or others. Check the buy widget for accepted cryptocurrencies.

Connect And Buy Click the BUY NOW button to connect your wallet, unlocking the Buy Widget. Select your desired amount of $STARS and choose your payment method. Select Buy and Stake to ensure you earn rewards!

FAQ

FAQ

What Is Crypto All-Stars?
Crypto All-Stars is the ultimate meme coin project, uniting the top meme coins worldwide – PEPE, Dogecoin, Floki, Mog, Milady, Brett, Turbo, and more – under one umbrella. This is the meme coin event of the century.
What Is The MemeVault?
The MemeVault is a revolutionary staking contract developed by Crypto All-Stars that allows all the top meme coins to be staked on a single platform. This brings the entire crypto space together as $STARS holders.
How Does $STARS Staking Work?
During the presale, all $STARS purchases can be staked immediately, enabling you to start earning rewards at a dynamic APY before the rest of the world joins in.
Check the current APY for an idea of how substantial your rewards could be. Presale buyers have a significant advantage!
How Do I Stake My Other Meme Coins?
With the launch of the Crypto All-Stars MemeVault, $STARS holders will be able to stake all their other top meme coins! However, to MAX OUT their staking rewards, they MUST hold $STARS. This mechanism unites the meme coin space into one project and strongly incentivizes long-term $STARS hodling.
Which Meme Coins Can Be Staked In The MemeVault?
When the $STARS token and MemeVault ecosystem are released, all the top meme coins will be eligible for staking. The initial list includes:
Pepe Coin: LINKDoge coin: LINKShiba Inu: LINKFloki Inu: LINKBased Brett: LINKMog Coin: LINKMilady: LINKTurbo Token: LINKToshi The Cat: LINKCoq Inu: LINKBonk Coin: LINK
More coins will be added in the future, but these will be available on day one!
How Do I Buy $STARS In Presale?
The presale buy widget at the top of the website is built on secure Web3Toolkit technology. Simply connect your wallet - such as Best Wallet or MetaMask - choose your payment method, and complete your purchase. Web3Payments also enables credit or debit card transactions to make buying $STARS even easier.
When Can I Claim My $STARS?
Once the Presale phase has ended, you'll be able to claim your $STARS tokens from the Crypto All-Stars website.

Crypto All-Stars

Stop chasing the next big coin. It's here.
